center.name: 云南省
center.summary: 云南省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联41种鸟类，包括花脸鸭、四川雉鹑、白马鸡等41种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: polychroa complex revealed through an integrative taxonomic approach|journal=Ibis|language=en|volume= 162|issue= 3|doi=10.1111/ibi.12759|issn=1474-919X|year=2019|pages=936–967}} It is found in Southeast Asia, where it is distributed from central Myanmar west to the western edge of Thailand and Laos, and north to the southern Yunnan Province in China

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It breeds in the East Palearctic (East Siberia to Tibet and South China); it winters to Northeast India, Yunnan and Southeast Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in south-west China (Sichuan, Yunnan and Guangxi provinces) and north-west Vietnam

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is distributed in the countries of Afghanistan, Pakistan, India, Bhutan, Nepal, and the Yunnan Province in China

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The buff-throated monal-partridge is endemic to the high mountains (3350–4600 m) of western China, and is distributed in southeastern Tibet, southern Qinghai, western Sichuan and northwestern Yunnan

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is migratory, wintering in the subtropics in northern India, southern China and the northern parts of south-east Asia. The birds remain in their winter quarters for quite long; specimens were taken in Yunnan in late March. It is a rare vagrant to western Europe. This species is adaptable; in the mountains of Bhutan for example, where small numbers winter, it is typically found in an agricultural habitat, mostly between ASL. It breeds in open coniferous woodland, often with some birch or willow

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In China, it is known to be found in the Mengyang Nature Reserve in Yunnan, and in the Nonggang National Nature Reserve and Diding Nature Reserve in Guangxi province

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Himalayas and the hills of Northeast India, Bangladesh, Myanmar, and southern China including Yunnan. Birds of this species are 25 cm with a long tail

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Yunnan, Northeast India, Laos, Myanmar, north-west Thailand, and northern Vietnam

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the northern Himalayas, Yunnan and central China, in the countries of Bangladesh, Bhutan, China, India, Myanmar and Nepal. Its natural habitat is arboreal forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Southeast Asia, the Indian subcontinent (mainly in the northeast) and southern Yunnan

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Himalayas (mainly Uttarakhand, Sikkim and Bhutan), Yunnan and northern parts of Myanmar and Vietnam

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is primarily resident or a short-distance altitudinal migrant, found in central China in Gansu, Qinghai, Sichuan, eastern Tibet, and northwestern Yunnan, and also a scarce winter visitor in Bhutan, northeasternmost India (Arunachal Pradesh and Sikkim), and eastern Nepal. It breeds in alpine scrub on rocky sites at altitudes of 3600–4500 metres, and descends down to 2100 metres, rarely to 1500 metres, in winter. It is a large thrush, 28 cm long (same size as a mistle thrush)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The orange-bellied leafbird (Chloropsis hardwickii) is a bird native to the central and eastern Himalayas, Yunnan and northern parts of Southeast Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It can be found in the prefectures of Yunnan, Sichuan, and Guizhou in Southwest China, where it prefers sparsely forested pine forests and avoids dense spruce and fir forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Himalayas, Yunnan, Northeast India and northern Indochina

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in most of Vietnam, the entire country of Laos, most of eastern Cambodia, northern Thailand, in most of Myanmar (except for Tanintharyi Region), in the Yunnan province of China, in far east Bangladesh (extremely rare), nearly all of Northeast India, and the far southeast of Bhutan

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is also found in southern China, in southeast Tibet, and in the provinces of Sichuan, Yunnan, Guizhou, Fujian and Zhejiang, and possibly in Hainan

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It was until recently considered a subspecies of the long-tailed wren-babbler; the IUCN, for example, started recognizing it as distinct species in 2008. It is found in China (Yunnan), India (Arunachal Pradesh), Myanmar, and Thailand

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the Himalayas, centre China, Yunnan and northern Indochina

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|left|Speckled Wood-Pigeon from Bhutan.Distribution: Speckled wood pigeon is distributed across the Himalayas, from Kashmir to western and central China (Including southern Gansu, western Sichuan, and western Yunnan), the presence of this species is also found in India, Myanmar, northern and western Thailand, northern and western Laos, Pakistan, Nepal, Bhutan, and Afghanistan. Habitat: Speckled wood pigeons inhabit tall evergreen and semi-evergreen hill forests, particularly those dominated by oak and Rhododendron, at altitudes ranging from , though it may descend to as low as in winter depending on food availability

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is largely migratory, wintering in southern and central Japan, South Korea and southern China, occasionally reaching as far as Yunnan, Taiwan and the Philippines

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Yunnan, Laos, Myanmar and Thailand

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: crossoptilon is found in China (Qinghai, Sichuan, Yunnan, and Tibet) where it tends to inhabit mixed forests and can be found around Buddhist monasteries

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Jerdon|Jerdon]], 1862) | synonyms = *Sturnus burmannicus}} The Burmese myna (Acridotheres burmannicus) is a species of starling in the family Sturnidae. It is found in Myanmar and Yunnan, China

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is migratory, breeding in Manchuria and migrating to central China, the province of Yunnan and northern Southeast Asia in the winter

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Its range extends from northeastern India to Vietnam and the province of Yunnan in southwestern China. It is a fairly uncommon species, but the population appears to be stable, and the International Union for Conservation of Nature has assessed its conservation status as being of "least concern". The stripe-breasted woodpecker is mainly found in montane evergreen forest, particularly pine and oak forest, but also the edges of deciduous forests, as well as more open areas with scattered trees

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in western Yunnan, southern Tibet, Northeast India and Myanmar

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The green peafowl was widely distributed in Southeast Asia in the past from southern China especially Yunnan, eastern and north-eastern India, southeastern Bangladesh, northern Myanmar, extending through Laos, and Thailand into Vietnam, Cambodia, Peninsular Malaysia, and the island of Java in Indonesia, but in Java they are only found in protected areas such as Ujung Kulon National Park and Baluran National Park

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is a migratory species, wintering in South Korea, Japan, Taiwan, northern and eastern China, from Beijing down the coast to the Vietnam border, and west to Yunnan then north to Chongqing and Henan. It breeds in pools on the tundra edge and within swampy forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Eastern Himalaya, Yunnan, Myanmar and Laos where its natural habitat is the dense undergrowth of subtropical or tropical moist broadleaved evergreen montane forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It breeds in central China and the Himalayas (where it winters in the southern foothills, as well as in southern Yunnan, the Patkai and northern Indochina

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Northeast India, Myanmar and Yunnan

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: phoenicea is found in Bangladesh, Bhutan, Myanmar, Northeast India, Nepal and western Yunnan

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in southern Yunnan, Laos, Myanmar, Thailand and Vietnam

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in northern India, Nepal, Bhutan and western Yunnan

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Yunnan, Northeast India and far northern Myanmar

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: gradaria occurs in the mountains of eastern Tibet and from eastern Nan Shan (Qinghai) to Yunnan and extreme northern Myanmar

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Their range continues eastward into southeastern China where they may be found in Yunnan, Guangxi and Guangdong Province northward in the east to the lower reaches of the Yangtze in Anhui and Zhejiang

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: cuttingi is found in northern Myanmar, along Myanmar's border with Chinese Yunnan and in northern Tonkin, Vietnam

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This species is found in southern China from Fujian to Yunnan, and south to Burma, Laos, Cambodia, Vietnam and Thailand. An individual recorded in Brunei may be an escaped captive or a vagrant. It has been introduced to Taiwan, Malaysia and Singapore.{{cite encyclopedia |last1=Craig |first1=A
